text.title: Solo Self Code Review Protocol Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: PR-142 - Migrate user.email to citext (RISKY)
example.note: checklist 10/10; AI second-reviewer caught case-collision risk in existing unique index; risk_flags_hit=[db_migration]; cool-off 24h; CI green at a3f1c8d; merge_decision=merge; rolled out behind feature flag; post-merge monitoring 30 min, all green.

example.title: Fast-merge migration disaster
example.note: Engineer merged migration 12 min after coding; risk flag missed; AI review skipped; cool-off skipped; failed in production at 2 AM. Tree caught: skip-checklist-fast-merge, ai-review-absent, twenty-four-hour-cooloff-risky. Post-incident rule: any migration PR auto-tagged RISKY by CI.
